name: Mushroom Sauce- Adventures in Microwave
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Fresh mushrooms, cleaned and sliced lengthwise
1 cup Chicken or beef broth (homemade, canned, or from a bouillon cube)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place mushrooms and butter in a 2-quart glass measuring pitcher. Cover with plastic wrap. Cook in microwave oven for 2 to 3 minutes at High, or until the mushrooms are tender; stir once.
2. Remove from oven. Blend flour into butter and cooked mushrooms. Add broth gradually, stirring constantly. Cook uncovered in microwave oven for 6 minutes at High; stir every minute.
3. Gradually add half-and-half to mushroom mixture, stirring constantly. Heat uncovered in microwave oven until serving temperature (about 2 minutes at High); stir once.
4. Remove from oven and stir in parsley and salt.
